shortDescription: Stylish 3-bedroom freehold townhouse in Dovercourt Village with three levels of living space.
fullDescription: Welcome to 92 Dovercourt Road in the vibrant Dovercourt Village neighbourhood. This stylish multi-level townhouse provides the space of a house with the convenience of condo living. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. All 3 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: In-suite laundry with full-size washer and dryer
Updated kitchen with quartz counters and soft-close cabinetry
